name: io.github.Liohtml/matomo-mcp
title: Matomo Analytics
description: Curated read-only Matomo Analytics tools: traffic, pages, referrers, e-commerce, real-time & more.

environmentVariables.name: MATOMO_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Matomo API token (token_auth) with view access

environmentVariables.name: MATOMO_DEFAULT_SITE_ID
environmentVariables.description: Optional default site ID so tools don't require an explicit site_id
